summary: The Abercrombie & Fitch brand teamed with singer-songwriter Gigi Perez to cover a Green Day classic as part of its largest summer campaign to date.

summary: The company's latest business campaign aims to make the point that the app sees itself as a top tier platform for advertisers, where the full funnel can happen within one experience.

summary: The boot brand is using the tech to help with inventory replenishment and allocation, and foster better interactions between associates and customers.

summary: Samy is tasked with developing a global influencer strategy for the CPG giant’s food business, which Unilever is in talks to sell to McCormick & Co.

title: House Democrats accuse CMS official of misleading Congress under oath
summary: CMS Deputy Administrator Kimberly Brandt told Congress last week that the CMS couldn’t meet with Minnesota before cutting off Medicaid funding because of litigation. Democrats say her testimony made no sense.
